assumptions: Logical uncompressed target bytes include depth32float; physical compression, cache, tile residency, and staging remain unclaimed.

byteLength.label: Measured
byteLength.source: correctness evidence-manifest ledger entry for bandwidth-model.json

logicalLowerBoundBytesPerFrame.label: Derived
logicalLowerBoundBytesPerFrame.source: one logical store per validated lab-owned render target

presentationRate.label: Derived
presentationRate.source: 1000 ms/s divided by measured refresh p50

logicalLowerBoundBytesPerSecond.label: Derived
logicalLowerBoundBytesPerSecond.source: logical lower bound bytes/frame multiplied by derived presentation rate
